title: BEM-923 protocol record
objective:
Create file governance/reports/BEM923_SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL.md with content # BEM-923 SYSTEM PROTOCOL V3 PROVIDER MODEL
Status: SYSTEM_PROTOCOL_V3_PROVIDER_MODEL_APPROVED_WITH_REQUIREMENTS
Date: 2026-05-30
Purpose: new full-system protocol version for evolving the system to working state, correcting BEM-921 by adding provider execution layer of internal contours.
Correction applied:
- This is a full-system protocol, not Telegram-only.
- BEM-921 logical contour model is kept but expanded with provider execution layer.
- Internal contour is logical roles plus provider assignment, failover policy, GitHub Actions/runner activation, exchange files, event log and proof.
Provider model:
- Primary internal contour: GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor.
- Reserve contour: GPT-Codex/Codex replaces Claude Auditor and Claude Executor when Claude limits or availability block execution.
- Analyst remains GPT in primary and reserve unless a future provider policy changes it.
- Prompt describes logical role; provider policy selects runtime provider.
- GitHub Actions, codex-runner, webhook and dispatch consumer are activation/proof mechanisms, not roles.
Required provider-aware registries:
- governance/state/providers_registry.json
- governance/state/contour_provider_policy.json
- governance/state/provider_failover_policy.json
- governance/state/elements_registry.json
- governance/state/contours_registry.json
Required envelope fields:
- logical_role
- provider_id
- provider_mode
- contour_id
- fallback_used
- fallback_reason
- runner_ref
- event_ref
- proof_ref
Roadmap update:
- BEM-920: elements/contours/prompts plus provider registry skeleton.
- BEM-921: proof hardening and non-null CI/Git SHA.
- BEM-922: Telegram input schema and GD routing.
- BEM-923: operator production gate.
- BEM-924: dispatch lifecycle with provider-aware auto-trigger.
- BEM-925: provider-aware object/contour execution lifecycle.
- BEM-926: managed channel/event/report pipeline with provider fields.
- BEM-927: E2E selftest including primary and reserve provider scenarios.
- BEM-928: Claude re-audit package with provider evidence.
